Algorithm.code: 1. Let _O_ be ? ToObject(*this* value). 1. Let _len_ be ? LengthOfArrayLike(_O_). 1. If IsCallable(_callback_) is *false*, throw a *TypeError* exception. 1. If _len_ = 0 and _initialValue_ is not present, throw a *TypeError* exception. 1. Let _k_ be _len_ - 1. 1. Let _accumulator_ be *undefined*. 1. If _initialValue_ is present, then 1. Set _accumulator_ to _initialValue_. 1. Else, 1. Let _kPresent_ be *false*. 1. Repeat, while _kPresent_ is *false* and _k_ ≥ 0, 1. Let _Pk_ be ! ToString(𝔽(_k_)). 1. Set _kPresent_ to ? HasProperty(_O_, _Pk_). 1. If _kPresent_ is *true*, then 1. Set _accumulator_ to ? Get(_O_, _Pk_). 1. Set _k_ to _k_ - 1. 1. If _kPresent_ is *false*, throw a *TypeError* exception. 1. Repeat, while _k_ ≥ 0, 1. Let _Pk_ be ! ToString(𝔽(_k_)). 1. Let _kPresent_ be ? HasProperty(_O_, _Pk_). 1. If _kPresent_ is *true*, then 1. Let _kValue_ be ? Get(_O_, _Pk_). 1. Set _accumulator_ to ? Call(_callback_, *undefined*, « _accumulator_, _kValue_, 𝔽(_k_), _O_ »). 1. Set _k_ to _k_ - 1. 1. Return _accumulator_.

BuiltinHead.name: Array.prototype.reduceRight
BuiltinHead.virtualPackage: 23 Indexed Collections.1 Array Objects.3 Properties of the Array Prototype Object.25 Array.prototype.reduceRight ( callback [ , initialValue ] )

Section.title: Properties of the Array Prototype Object
